name: Gladly
api_notes: The API surface includes a REST API for core platform actions and a Lookup API for integrating custom data sources into the agent experience. Documentation includes standard endpoints for resources like Agents, Customers, and conversations.
one_liner: Gladly is an AI-driven customer service platform that unifies customer communication channels into a single, lifelong conversation history.

evidence.claim: Gladly provides a REST API and a Lookup API for integrations.
API tokens are created within the Gladly UI by users with specific permissions.
Search citation: Main Home - Gladly Developer
Search citation: Introduction to App Platform

mcp_notes: No official or community-maintained Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was identified in the provided documentation.
access_notes: API access is a feature of the Gladly platform. A developer needs to log into a configured Gladly instance and be assigned the specific "API User" role by a Gladly Administrator to generate tokens. There is no self-serve public developer sign-up for free API access.
auth_notes: Uses token-based Basic Authentication where the token acts as the password. API tokens are associated with a specific Gladly user account.
blocker: The requirement for an existing paid Gladly subscription and manual assignment of the 'API User' permission by an administrator prevents open self-serve access.
